description: Catalog of narrative templates available in the pptx.dev library. Each entry is a lightweight summary; full beat definitions live in the per-template JSON files alongside this index.

templates.name: Problem → Solution
templates.summary: Classic business arc: name the pain, raise the stakes, present your fix, prove it, ask.

templates.name: SCQA (Situation–Complication–Question–Answer)
templates.summary: Minto's pyramid-principle opener; ideal for executive memos and strategic recommendations.

templates.name: Startup Pitch Deck
templates.summary: Canonical investor-pitch arc drawn from Sequoia and YC templates; optimized for 10–15 minute meetings.

templates.name: Quarterly Business Review
templates.summary: Standard internal review arc: recap, performance, insights, plan, risks, asks.
